title: Check Whether An Unknown Inducted Parcel Was Assigned Default Dimensions
summary: Use this source-based diagnostic to verify whether a parcel matches the training-slide fallback case in which OptiSweep assigns default dimensions when the first message fails and an unknown parcel is inducted.
when_to_use: Use when reviewing parcel evidence or message history to determine whether a parcel may have received default dimensions under the source-described fallback condition: the first message failed and an unknown parcel was inducted.
not_for: Do not use to determine the actual default dimension values, because the source does not provide them.
Do not use as a corrective or recovery procedure, because the source only describes the fallback condition and outcome.
Do not use when available evidence cannot show whether the parcel was unknown inducted or whether the first message failed.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Review available parcel induction evidence and message history against the source-described fallback condition.

safety_notes: This candidate is source-described as support safe.
Use only available evidence from parcel induction or message history; do not infer unsupported values or system behavior beyond the source statement.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to parcel induction evidence or message history
Training slide describing default-dimensions fallback behavior

access_required: Access to parcel induction evidence or message history
system_preconditions: A parcel case is available for review.
Available evidence can be checked for unknown induction status and first-message presence or failure.
external_references: Training slide describing default-dimensions fallback behavior

visual_references.description: Training slide stating that if the first message fails and something unknown is inducted, OptiSweep assigns default dimensions.

steps.title: Identify the parcel as an unknown inducted case
steps.purpose: Establish whether the parcel matches the first condition named in the source fallback statement.
steps.instruction: Review the available parcel case evidence and identify whether the parcel is described or evidenced as an unknown inducted parcel.
steps.expected_result: The parcel is either confirmed as an unknown inducted case or cannot be confirmed from available evidence.
steps.healthy_condition: Available evidence supports that the parcel was unknown inducted.
steps.failure_condition: Available evidence does not show that the parcel was unknown inducted.

actions.label: Review parcel case evidence
actions.exact_action: Identify a parcel case described as unknown inducted.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Look at the lifecycle slide text describing the fallback condition for an unknown inducted parcel.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop or escalate if available evidence does not show whether the parcel was unknown inducted.

source_evidence.text: Identify a parcel case described as unknown inducted.
If this message fails and we see something unknown inducted, it is assigned default dimensions by OptiSweep.

source_ref.quote_or_summary: Slide OCR: If this message fails and we see something unknown inducted, it is assigned default dimensions by OptiSweep.

steps.title: Check whether the first message failed or is absent
steps.purpose: Verify the message-failure condition that the source ties to default-dimension assignment.
steps.instruction: Check the available evidence for the initial message associated with tracking ID, dimensions, and package type. Determine whether that first message failed or is absent in the evidence being reviewed.
steps.expected_result: The first message is either shown as failed or absent, or the evidence is insufficient to determine its status.
steps.healthy_condition: Available evidence supports that the first message failed or is absent for the parcel under review.
steps.failure_condition: The first message appears present and successful, or the evidence does not show whether it failed.

actions.label: Review first-message evidence
actions.exact_action: Check whether the initial message associated with tracking ID, dimensions, and package type failed or is absent according to the available evidence.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Look at the slide text describing the first Chat message as containing tracking ID, dimensions, and package type, and the fallback statement if this message fails.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the parcel appears unknown inducted but available evidence does not show whether the initial message failed.

source_evidence.text: Check whether the initial message associated with tracking ID, dimensions, and package type failed or is absent according to the available evidence.
The first Chat message contains tracking ID, dimensions, and package type.

source_ref.quote_or_summary: Lifecycle of a parcel slide: parcels are unloaded onto belts leading to sorter induction; first Chat message contains tracking ID, dimensions, and package type; second message contains tracking ID, barcode data, dimensional data, and potential destination data.

source_evidence.text: If this message fails and we see something unknown inducted, it is assigned default dimensions by OptiSweep.

source_ref.quote_or_summary: Slide OCR: If this message fails and we see something unknown inducted, it is assigned default dimensions by OptiSweep.

steps.title: Verify whether the parcel matches the default-dimensions fallback case
steps.purpose: Determine whether the parcel fits the exact source-described combination that leads to default dimensions.
steps.instruction: Using only the source-described fallback behavior, verify whether the parcel was assigned default dimensions by OptiSweep based on the combination of an unknown inducted parcel and failure of the first message.
steps.expected_result: You can conclude whether the parcel matches the source-described fallback case for default dimensions, or determine that the evidence is insufficient.
steps.healthy_condition: The parcel evidence aligns with both source conditions: unknown inducted and first-message failure, supporting the conclusion that OptiSweep assigned default dimensions.
steps.failure_condition: One or both source conditions are not supported by the evidence, so the fallback case cannot be confirmed.

actions.label: Compare evidence to fallback rule
actions.exact_action: Verify whether the parcel was assigned default dimensions by OptiSweep, using only the source-described fallback behavior.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Look at the exact fallback statement tying default dimensions to first-message failure and an unknown inducted parcel.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop or escalate if the evidence does not support both the unknown-inducted condition and the first-message failure condition.
Do not infer what the default dimension values are, because the source does not provide them.

source_evidence.text: Verify whether the parcel was assigned default dimensions by OptiSweep, using only the source-described fallback behavior.
If this message fails and we see something unknown inducted, it is assigned default dimensions by OptiSweep.

source_ref.quote_or_summary: Slide OCR: If this message fails and we see something unknown inducted, it is assigned default dimensions by OptiSweep.

steps.title: Record the source-based conclusion
steps.purpose: Document the diagnostic conclusion exactly as supported by the source.
steps.instruction: Record whether the parcel matches the source statement that ties default dimensions to the combination of first-message failure and an unknown inducted parcel. Include the slide evidence reference in the record.
steps.expected_result: A source-grounded diagnostic note is recorded without adding unsupported details.
steps.healthy_condition: The conclusion is documented with the source linkage and without inferring unspecified values or behaviors.
steps.failure_condition: The conclusion omits the source basis or adds unsupported details such as actual default dimension values.

actions.label: Document source-based finding
actions.exact_action: Record that the source ties default dimensions to the combination of initial message failure and an unknown inducted parcel.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Use the slide text showing the default-dimensions fallback statement as the supporting image reference.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop or escalate if the conclusion would require unsupported assumptions beyond the source statement.
Do not record actual default dimension values, because the source does not provide them.

source_evidence.text: Record that the source ties default dimensions to the combination of initial message failure and an unknown inducted parcel. [Image support needed: slide text showing the default-dimensions fallback statement.]
Training slide describing the parcel lifecycle and stating that if the first message fails and an unknown parcel is inducted, OptiSweep assigns default dimensions.

success_criteria: The reviewer determines whether the parcel matches the source-described fallback case for default dimensions.
The conclusion is based only on evidence of an unknown inducted parcel and first-message failure or absence.
The finding is documented with the supporting source reference.
healthy_conditions: The parcel is evidenced as unknown inducted.
The first message associated with tracking ID, dimensions, and package type is evidenced as failed or absent.
The diagnostic conclusion is limited to the source-described fallback behavior.
failure_conditions: Available evidence does not show whether the parcel was unknown inducted.
Available evidence does not show whether the first message failed.
The reviewer attempts to infer actual default dimension values not provided by the source.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the parcel appears unknown inducted but available evidence does not show whether the initial message failed.
Escalate if available evidence is insufficient to confirm the source-described fallback condition.
Do not infer what the default dimension values are, because the source does not provide them.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Slide text stating that if the first message fails and something unknown is inducted, OptiSweep assigns default dimensions.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: Slide OCR: If this message fails and we see something unknown inducted, it is assigned default dimensions by OptiSweep.

missing_details: The source does not provide the actual default dimension values.
The source does not provide a specific screen, query, or system workflow for checking message failure.
The source does not provide corrective actions if the fallback condition is confirmed.
The source does not provide timing estimates for this diagnostic.
